conditions.description: Participation is limited to legal entities established in EU Member States, Iceland, Norway, and the following associated countries: Canada, Israel, Republic of Korea, New Zealand, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom.
Entities controlled by non-eligible countries may be excluded from participation unless appropriate guarantees are provided.
Activities are expected to start at TRL 2 and achieve TRL 5 by the end of the project.
Maximum EU contribution per project is €19,000,000.
Standard Horizon Europe RIA minimum consortium composition: at least 3 independent legal entities established in at least 3 different EU Member States or associated countries.
conditions.assumption_note: Standard minimum consortium composition requirement for Horizon Europe RIA actions. Not explicitly stated in the topic text, curated call extract, or call slice for this topic. Adopted from standard Horizon Europe RIA instrument practice. Must be verified against Tier 1 normative framework (General Annexes) and Tier 2A RIA instrument schema before use in compliance determination.

conditions.description: Financial support to third parties (FSTP) is permitted under the following cumulative limits: maximum €300,000 per third party at grant stage 2; maximum €2,250,000 per grant at stage 3; maximum €2,550,000 per third party in total across stages.
